text:
Dracoderma Skin (, Ryūhi-byō Kanja no Hifu—lit. "Skin of Patient with Eczema [or 'Dragon Skin Disease']") is the skin of a patient afflicted by a disease that leads to the development of lizard-like skin. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 70 

Background

It is one of the requested items for the Nostrade bodyguard applicants to obtain. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

The Dracoderma Skin is retrieved and delivered by Melody, which allows her to be hired as a bodyguard. 

Trivia

The item's name does not appear concisely in the manga or the 2011 anime adaptation. Instead, a description is used: "Skin from a patient with Dracoderma" in the Viz translation of the manga and "An ichthyosis patient's scaly skin" Hunter × Hunter - Episode 39 (2011) or "The scaly skin of an ichthyosis patient" Hunter × Hunter - Episode 41 (2011) in Crunchyroll's version/translation.

Anime and Manga Differences

The Dracoderma Skin does not appear or is mentioned in the 1999 anime adaptation. Instead, Melody presents a piece of General Sharman's brain tissue in order to become a Nostrade bodyguard. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 50 (1999) 

Intertextuality and References

"Dracoderma" (龍皮病, meaning "Dragon Skin Disease") is very likely based on a real-life disease, the ichthyosis (as it is called in the anime)—a family of rare genetic skin disorders characterized by dry, thickened, scaly skin.

Translations around the World
